name: Coffee Table Leia L
description: Coffee Table Leia Large, Sculptural, soft-rounded, and elegantly modern Coffee Table Leia is available in black wood veneer, walnut wood veneer, or a cognac leather base with a white lacquered top. Leia brings warmth and refinement to any living space. Its gently curved pedestal base and floating, rounded tabletop create a balanced, contemporary silhouette. Offered in three sizes , Leia can stand alone or be combined into a layered composition, making it ideal for both compact interiors and expansive lounge areas. We recommend pairing Coffee table Leia with the Small and Medium Large version for a stunning three piece set or to mix it with the other colour options like Walnut Small wood or White lacquered .

Available in the full size as well as 2.8m and 2.6m versions on request , it adapts beautifully to both spacious and compact living environments. A refined balance of strength, softness, and everyday sophistication. Sofa Dean is also available in a warm Beige and a Real Leather version.

name: Floor Lamp Cary
description: Floor Lamp Cary – A gesture of light, drawn in a single line of elegance. Created in collaboration with Kappenow , Cary embodies the harmony between sculptural design and intelligent function. Its slender steel arc, weighted base, and refined shade transform lighting into art. It is architectural, serene, and quietly powerful. Equipped with a dimmer , memory function , and tactile Harman Kardon dial , Cary offers precise control and a sensory experience that complements its minimalist silhouette. Perfect beside a sofa, in reading corners, or within boutique interiors, Cary redefines modern lighting through balance, restraint, and timeless beauty. Part of the Cornelius Lighting Collection, designed to illuminate spaces with poise, emotion, and enduring craftsmanship.
